titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 544
GA 544
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: τη changed to την at 18.16 by David Parker.
1.10 rewritten and line numbers fixed in F198v by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 5.7 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Supplied initials added at 2.12, 13, 6.5, 19.3 by David Parker.
Correction added in 18.14 by David Parker.
Word break in 7.45 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status: G-Α 544Αnn Αrbor, Univ. Libr., Μs. 25John begins Folio 198rΤranscribed by: WJΕ Τranscription begun:18-02-09Τranscription finished:20-03-09Τransference to Collate by: Τransference to Collate begun:Τransference to Collate finished:Ρlaced in Level1:20-03-09Ρlaced in Level2:Τhese files were compared and differences resolved by:Αdded in Level3:Final transcription file: Comments:

ab.note: This word is missing an initial.
This word is missing an initial.
This word is missing an initial.
It appears that a corrector may have erased ε with a view to replacing it (with ο?) but did not replace it.
It appears that a corrector may have erased μι with a view to replacing it with μη but did not replace it.
This word is missing an initial.
It appears that a corrector may have erased ετι with a view to replacing it (with -ας?) but did not replace it.
It appears that a corrector may have erased η with a view to replacing it (with ει?) but did not replace it.
